name: karpinski-claude-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: process-probe
plugins.description: Credential-safe helpers for inspecting a running process — env vars, argv, file descriptors, network connections — paired with a PreToolUse hook that blocks direct reads of /proc/<pid>/environ and /proc/<pid>/cmdline. The helpers redact values whose name matches a credential keyword OR whose value matches a known credential shape (sk-…, ghp_…, AKIA…, JWT, PEM, etc.) or a length-and-entropy gate, with per-name --unsafe-show overrides that are auditable in the transcript.
